Furan frontier-orbital energies and HOMO-LUMO gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, used as-is. SCF converged in 9 cycles.

HOMO = -6.3597638 eV
LUMO = -0.1024036 eV
HOMO-LUMO Gap = 6.2573602 eV

No warnings reported.
